title: collandra sanguinea
intro: Collandra sanguinea, also known as blood of the dragon tree, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties, making it useful for treating a variety of health issues. The health benefits of Collandra sanguinea include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and treat skin conditions such as acne and wounds. The plant is commonly prepared as a tincture, tea, or salve, and can be used externally to treat skin conditions or taken internally to address various health issues.
